description_long: This is a male adult figure dressed in business attire, featuring a collared shirt with a tie, fitted trousers, and formal shoes. The shirt is buttoned up and tucked into the pants, which are secured with a visible belt. The figure's hands are relaxed and slightly open at the sides, and the posture is upright and neutral. The hairstyle is short and neatly styled, with a side part and some volume on top. The overall appearance is clean, professional, and suitable for an urban or office environment. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the clothing fits closely to the body, emphasizing a formal look.
description: A male adult in business attire with a collared shirt, tie, fitted trousers, and formal shoes, standing upright with a neat hairstyle.
description_view_0: Front view shows the collared shirt, tie, belt, and formal shoes, with arms slightly out and hands visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the fit of the shirt and trousers, and the side part of the hairstyle.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the shirt, trousers, and shoes, as well as the hairstyle from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, shirt fit, and hairstyle details.
attribute_clothing_type: business shirt with tie, fitted trousers, and formal belt
attribute_hairstyle: short, neatly styled with a side part
